title: cytisus supinus subsp. pseudorochelii
intro: Cytisus supinus subsp. pseudorochelii, also known as the Spurred Rockrose, is a plant species within the Fabaceae family and a sub-species of Cytisus supinus. It has been used for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant properties, making it beneficial for various health issues such as wound healing, digestive problems, and respiratory issues. The plant's health benefits include its ability to reduce inflammation, promote tissue repair, and exhibit immunomodulatory effects, which may help in managing conditions like arthritis and allergies. Cytisus supinus subsp. pseudorochelii can be used in herbal preparations such as teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are often consumed for its medicinal properties.
